name: run_payroll
description: Create and calculate a payroll run for a company. Computes gross-to-net wages including federal and state taxes, benefit deductions, and garnishments for the specified pay period.

parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description: The UUID of the company to run payroll for.

parameters.name: off_cycle
parameters.description: Whether this is an off-cycle (ad hoc) payroll rather than a regular scheduled run.

parameters.name: off_cycle_reason
parameters.description: Reason for the off-cycle payroll. Required if off_cycle is true.

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Start date of the pay period in YYYY-MM-DD format.

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: End date of the pay period in YYYY-MM-DD format.
